problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
